info.title: SLNX-validator
info.description: Validates .slnx solution files for issues that Visual Studio and MSBuild silently ignore, including XSD schema violations, missing solution folder files, and wildcard misuse. Supports single files, folders, and glob patterns.

options.name: --sonarqube-report-file
options.description: Write a SonarQube generic issue report to the specified file path.

options.name: --continue-on-error
options.description: Continue and exit with code 0 even when validation errors are found. [default: False]

options.name: --required-files
options.description: Semicolon-separated glob patterns for files that must exist on disk and be referenced as <File> elements in the solution.

arguments.name: input
arguments.description: Path to a .slnx file, directory, glob pattern (e.g. src/*.slnx), or comma-separated combination.
